name: Lyell Immunopharma, Inc.
summary: Lyell Immunopharma, Inc. is a late-stage clinical cell therapy company focused on developing T cell therapies for cancer. Its lead product candidates include rondecabtagene autoleucel (ronde-cel, LYL314) and LYL273 (formerly GCC19CART). The company conducts its own manufacturing at its LyFE Manufacturing Center in Bothell, Washington, and has no approved products or product revenue to date.

products.name: rondecabtagene autoleucel (ronde-cel, LYL314)
products.description: Late-stage clinical cell therapy product candidate for cancer treatment.

products.name: LYL273 (formerly GCC19CART)
products.description: Cell therapy product candidate acquired from Innovative Cellular Therapeutics, targeting cancer.

products.name: LyFE Manufacturing Center
products.description: Clinical manufacturing facility in Bothell, Washington used to produce drug supply for clinical trials.

partnerships.description: Lyell acquired rights to LYL273 (formerly GCC19CART) from Innovative Cellular Therapeutics in November 2025.
